hero.title: Connect global hotel supply and demand through one platform
hero.subtitle: KabuK Exchange is a B2B2B travel distribution platform by KabuK Style Inc. — connecting hotels, OTAs, agencies, wholesalers, and technology partners through API-driven connectivity.
home.serve.hotels.d: Independent hotels, ryokan, and multi-property groups looking to reach new demand while keeping control of distribution.
home.serve.otas.d: Online travel agencies and marketplaces sourcing quality, well-structured Japanese and global hotel supply.
home.serve.agencies.d: Retail, corporate, and destination management agencies serving domestic and international travelers.
home.serve.wholesalers.d: Bedbanks and aggregators that redistribute supply to a wide downstream network.
home.serve.connectivity.d: Technology partners connecting property systems to distribution.
home.serve.kabuk.d: KabuK Style services such as HafH, extending reach into subscription and community-driven demand.
home.why.japan.d: A growing base of Japanese hotels and ryokan, structured for reliable international distribution.
home.why.global.d: Designed to connect supply with demand partners across regions and channels.
home.why.api.d: Modern APIs for search, booking, and content — built for scalable integration.
home.why.support.d: Onboarding and operational assistance designed to keep integrations running smoothly.
home.why.pricing.d: Tools designed to help suppliers manage pricing and channel eligibility.
home.why.settlement.d: Billing, payment, and settlement coordination designed for multi-party commerce.
home.cap.supply.d: Distribute inventory, rates, and content to demand partners.
home.cap.api.d: Search, availability, and booking APIs for partner integration.
home.cap.pricing.d: Designed to support channel-specific pricing and eligibility rules.
home.cap.billing.d: Billing and payment coordination across parties.
home.cap.onboarding.d: Structured onboarding for suppliers and demand partners.
home.cap.visibility.d: Reporting and operational insight into activity and performance.
home.cap.ai.d: AI assistance for onboarding, support, and pricing.
home.net.p: Rather than maintaining point-to-point links with every counterpart, participants connect once to KabuK Exchange and reach the wider ecosystem. Supply flows outward to demand partners; bookings and settlement flow back — coordinated through one platform.
home.net.li1: Hotels and hotel groups publish supply
home.net.li2: OTAs, agencies, and wholesalers consume demand
home.net.li3: PMS and channel managers connect systems
